name: Google Maps
description: Real-time GPS routing and traffic-aware dispatch for optimal delivery routes across Benin City.

name: WhatsApp
description: Instant order notifications and live tracking updates sent directly to your WhatsApp number.

name: Opay
description: Seamless mobile payment integration allowing customers to pay via Opay transfer at checkout.

name: Palmpay
description: Fast and secure Palmpay payment processing for all delivery orders within the platform.

name: SMS Gateway
description: Automated SMS alerts for order confirmation, rider assignment, and delivery completion updates.

name: GPS Tracking
description: Live GPS tracking integration providing real-time location data for all active delivery riders.

name: Instagram
description: Social media ordering integration allowing customers to request deliveries directly from Instagram.

name: Email
description: Automated email receipts, delivery summaries, and promotional offers sent to all registered users.

name: Payment Terminal
description: POS integration for cashless payments at pickup points, supporting bank cards and USSD transfers.
